name: @runner-examples/agent-orchestration
description: Runner durable workflow example for agent orchestration with a revision loop

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/index.test.js dist/stress.test.js dist/redis-runtime.test.js
scripts.coverage: npm run build && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=dist/app.js --test-coverage-include=dist/index.js --test-coverage-include=dist/signals.js --test-coverage-include=dist/stress.js --test-coverage-include=dist/workflow.js --test-coverage-exclude=dist/*.test.js --test-coverage-lines=100 --test-coverage-functions=100 --test-coverage-branches=100 dist/index.test.js dist/stress.test.js dist/redis-runtime.test.js
